page_metadata.biotools__summary: AStarix is a sequence-to-graph semi-global aligner based on A* shortest path algorithm. It supports general graphs and finds alignments that are optimal according to edit-distance with non-negative weights.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AStarix is a sequence-to-graph semi-global aligner based on A* shortest path algorithm. It supports general graphs and finds alignments that are optimal according to edit-distance with non-negative weights.
